---
title: "Program"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
## Program
The following schedule is tentative and subject to change.
:::


::: {.schedule-wrap}
::: {.schedule-grid}

<!-- ::: {.schedule-corner} -->
<!-- Time -->
<!-- ::: -->

::: {.day-header style="grid-column: 2;"}
**Day 1**  
Wednesday, 23.9
:::

::: {.day-header style="grid-column: 3;"}
**Day 2**  
Thursday, 24.9
:::

::: {.day-header style="grid-column: 4;"}
**Day 3**  
Friday, 25.9
:::

<!-- Time labels: each row is a 15-minute step starting from 10:00. -->

<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 2;"} -->
<!-- 10:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 6;"} -->
<!-- 11:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 10;"} -->
<!-- 12:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 14;"} -->
<!-- 13:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 18;"} -->
<!-- 14:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 22;"} -->
<!-- 15:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 26;"} -->
<!-- 16:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->
<!---->
<!-- ::: {.time-label style="grid-row: 30;"} -->
<!-- 17:00 -->
<!-- ::: -->

<!-- Day 1 -->

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 3 / 6;"}
**Welcome/Introduction**   9:30-10:00  
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 6 / 11;"}
**Talk 1** 10:00-11:00
:::

::: {.schedule-event .coffee style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 11 / 14;"}
**Coffee break**   11:00–11:30
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 14 / 19;"}
**Talk 2**  11:30–12:30
:::

::: {.schedule-event .lunch style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 19 / 28;"}
**Lunch break**
12:30–14:00
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 28 / 33;"}
**Talk 3**  14:00–15:00  
:::

::: {.schedule-event .coffee style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 33 / 36;"}
**Coffee break** 15:00–15:30
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 2; grid-row: 36 / 41;"}
**Talk 4**  15:30–16:30
:::

<!-- Day 2 -->



::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 6 / 17;"}
**Lecture 5**
10:00–12:00
:::

::: {.schedule-event .lunch style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 17 / 28;"}
**Lunch break**
12:00–14:00
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 28 / 33;"}
**Talk 6**  
14:00–15:00  
Speaker TBA
:::

::: {.schedule-event .coffee style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 33 / 36;"}
**Coffee break**  15:00–15:30
:::

<!-- ::: {.schedule-event .tutorial style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 28 / 38;"} -->
<!-- **Tutorial / Discussion**   -->
<!-- 15:15–17:00   -->
<!-- Topic TBA -->
<!-- ::: -->

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 3; grid-row: 36 / 41;"}
**Talk 7**  
15:30–16:30
:::


<!-- Day 3 -->

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 4; grid-row: 6 / 11;"}
**Talk 8**  10:00–11:00
:::

::: {.schedule-event .coffee style="grid-column: 4; grid-row: 11 / 14;"}
**Coffee break**  11:00–11:30
:::

::: {.schedule-event .talk style="grid-column: 4; grid-row: 14 / 19;"}
**Talk 9**  11:30–12:30  
:::

:::
